name: Tomato and Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler pan.
2. Combine chopped tomato, onion, and basil in a bowl and set aside.
3. Brush the fillets of fish with oil and season with salt and pepper.
4. Place the tomato mixture in the center of each fillet.
5. Melt butter in a skillet.
6. Cook and stir the onion until tender.
7. Place the fish in the skillet.
8. Add lemon juice and water to the skillet.
9. Simmer until the fish is cooked through (10 minutes).
